query:
ALTER TABLE houses 
ADD COLUMN isGenesis BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN genesisRIN VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN genesisHash VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN statementOfPurpose TEXT,
ADD COLUMN flameLightingTimestamp TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN genesisDeclarationDocId INT;
